title: Grilled Kenyan Skewers with Delicate German Onions
description: Traditional German-inspired dish featuring marinated Kenyan beef skewers grilled to perfection and served with caramelized onions.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, salt, pepper, paprika, and garlic.
Add the Kenyan beef strips to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the beef strips onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the beef reaches an internal temperature of 145°F.
Meanwhile, heat a tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-low heat.
Add the delicate onions to the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, for 20-25 minutes or until caramelized.
Serve the grilled skewers with the caramelized onions on top.
Squeeze a tablespoon of lemon juice over the skewers and serve immediately.
